Template Use Case/Title: Update Customer Review
Applicable SOPs: Problem with an Order (PWAO) SOP (DSC2S) NA > General Order Inquiries
English Text: Hello [supplier name], Thank you for reaching out regarding this review. Unfortunately, the Click to Ship team is unable to remove reviews from the site. We strive to be as transparent with our customers as possible, and we encourage them to leave their feedback with any and all purchases they make from Wayfair. In order to ensure our customers are making the best, most informed purchases for themselves, it is Wayfair’s policy that reviews never be altered or deleted. However, there is a review process for egregiously incorrect reviews (ie, the wrong product is being reviewed), and if you feel that this is the case, please reach out to the Supplier Service Desk at supplierservicedesk@wayfair.com . We also recommend focusing on aspects such as merchandising and fulfillment that will lead to a positive customer experience, and the good reviews that will result will certainly outweigh one less positive one! Thanks again for reaching out. I am marking this ticket as complete. If you need further support with this issue, please comment to re-open. Help us improve by sharing your feedback. English Text: Hello [supplier name], Thank you for letting us know about the issue with the order quantities/part number. I can help resolve this. Because we are unable to make any changes to a PO once it has been submitted to your team, we have canceled this PO. For future instances of PO Data being incorrect or needing updates, please enter a ticket to Wayfair’s Merchandising team. For more information on where to enter this ticket in PartnerHome, please review the below Help Center Article: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/209 To ensure that your items listing is correct, I will be transferring this ticket to our Merchandising team to help correct this issue. Note: The Partner Home ticket identifier will change from AOPS- to ENRICH-. Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. Thank you,
Mandarin Text: 尊敬的[supplier name]供应商团队，您好： 感谢您告知我们订单数量/产品编码的问题。我可以协助您解决此问题。由于订单一旦提交给您的团队，我们就无法对其进行任何更改，因此我们已取消此订单。 如果您以后遇到订单数据错误或需要更新的情况，请向 Wayfair 的产品团队提交工单。有关如何在 PartnerHome 中提交工单的更多信息，请参阅以下帮助中心文章： https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/2146 为确保您的产品链接信息准确无误，我会将此工单转交给我们的产品团队，以协助您解决此问题。 注意：该 Partner Home 工单的前缀将从AOPS- 更改为 ENRICH-。 谢谢， [Agent Name]

English Text: Hello [Supplier Name], Thank you for letting us know about the quantity issue on this order. I can review this order with you today. Template Use Case/Title: Replacement PO MOQ Clarification
Applicable SOPs: Problem with an Order (PWAO) SOP (DSC2S) NA > PO Data Issues
English Text: Hello [Supplier Name], Thank you for letting us know about the quantity issue on this order. I can review this order with you today. I will be transferring this request to Wayfair’s outreach team who will be able to contact the customer and provide them alternative resolutions and then process the cancellation. Template Use Case/Title: green location NA Specific SU Received Consumer Credits Email
Applicable SOPs: Problem with an Order (PWAO) SOP (DSC2S) NA > Returns
English Text: Hi Valued Supplier Team, I apologize for the frustration in receiving the emails to confirm cancellations have been received. There is a known error with these that our tech team has been looking into. These emails are from an old process that is no longer used. Currently if we do not show movement on return tracking or do not receive a return tracking number from the customer we do not process a return credit to the customer as the customer will contact us to provide the return tracking information. Updating the return expectations for customers negated the need for our vendor accounts to spend time responding to confirm returns have been received if we do not show movement on return tracking. The system shows these emails are off but we know some are occasionally generated to suppliers and the tech team has not yet determined why these are being sent or what is triggering them. No action is needed on any emails generated to you from customercredits@wayfair.com . I have reported your request as part of the ongoing issue. Please feel free to disregard any future emails from this email address. Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. Best,
Mandarin Text: 尊敬的[supplier name]供应商团队，您好： 对于您在收到确认已收到退货的邮件时所产生的困扰，我深表歉意。目前系统确实存在一个已知错误，我们的技术团队也正在对此进行调查。这些邮件其实属于一套早已不再使用的旧流程。 目前，如果我们在退货物流没有显示任何进展，或者没有收到客户提供的退货运单号，我们将不会向客户处理退款。通过更新针对客户的退货预期，只要退货物流没有更新，我们就不再需要供应商特意花时间去回复并确认已收到退货。 系统显示这些邮件本应处于关闭状态，但我们知道偶尔还是会有一些邮件发送给供应商，技术团队尚未确定这些邮件的发送原因或触发机制。您无需对来自 customercredits@wayfair.com 的任何邮件采取任何行动。我已经将您的诉求作为此问题的后续处理事项之一上报。 请忽略来自此邮箱地址的任何后续邮件。 我们希望确保您的所有问题都能得到解决，如果此问题仍然存在，请随时在此工单中联系我们，我将很乐意为您提供进一步的帮助。如果目前您的问题已得到解决，祝您一切顺利！ 谢谢，顺颂商祺！ [Agent Name] 请分享您的反馈，帮助我们改进服务。稍后您将收到一封包含调查问卷的电子邮件，或者您也可以在Partner Home上对任何已关闭的工单提供反馈。我们非常重视与您的合作。

Template Use Case/Title: Replacement Part Confirm Charges Request (RP_Charges)

English Text: Hi {SU Name}/Team, Thank you for reaching out to clarify the replacement parts process. Replacement Parts are not covered in the Damage and Defect Allowance, and you should send these to the customer at your own expense. English Text: Hello [supplier name], Thank you for reaching out about this PO. I apologize if this caused any confusion, but I am happy to help clarify. We want to make sure all your concerns are heard, so if this issue persists, please feel free to reach back out in this thread, and I will be happy to further assist. Otherwise, if I've resolved your concerns for the time being, I hope you have a great day! Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. Thank you,

Template Use Case/Title: Supplier Shipping and Fulfillment Policy Education
Applicable SOPs: Problem with an Order (PWAO) SOP (DSC2S) Supplier Self Service Updates
English Text: Hi [Supplier Team] I’m happy to review more information on our updated shipping and fulfillment policy. Beginning December 15th, 2025 a new compliance policy went into effect regarding shipping orders from the assigned warehouse the Wayfair system designates. Orders are routed based on inventory availability at the time the order is placed. To help support maintaining your success while minimizing financial impacts, please keep in mind the following: To ensure orders are routed to the correct warehouse: Keep warehouse hours, holidays, and contact info updated in Partner Home. Report accurate inventory at all warehouses. Warehouse assignments are based on supplier’s reported inventory and the customer’s delivery address. Regularly audit warehouse inventory accuracy and fulfillment reliability. Suppliers will face credit deductions for ship costs incurred when shipping from a warehouse other than the one assigned by Wayfair (including international shipments) that results in higher costs. If the risk of these deductions is not acceptable, please be aware the following options we are able to support at this time: Submit an order delay for the PO until you are able to ship it from the system-assigned warehouse. You can read more information about submitting an order delay here: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/1440 Select a new warehouse that has inventory available to fulfill this order; please note, this option will result in the aforementioned credit deductions. Please see the following help center resource for more information and the complete updated policy: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/3348 We want to make sure all your concerns are heard, so if this issue persists, please feel free to reach back out in this thread, and I will be happy to further assist. Otherwise, if I've resolved your concerns for the time being, I hope you have a great day! Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership.

Template Use Case/Title: green location NA Specific Shipping to Puerto Rico Instructions
Applicable SOPs: Problem with an Order (PWAO) SOP (DSC2S) NA > Shipping Outside Continental US
English Text: Hello [supplier name], Thank you for reaching out regarding this shipping label. I apologize that it’s not generating in Dropship Orders. You are able to ship to Puerto Rico by printing a label via FedEx.com directly and billing Wayfair 3rd party on our account number, 252225761. Please process the order as a standard FedEx International Economy shipment. Please follow the instructions below to process the order: 1.) First check whether or not the carton size is able to ship to Puerto Rico. 2.) When you get into the billing and shipping information, you will need to click on the ‘Ship to a different address’ button regardless of whether the billing and shipping address are the same. 3.) In the Billing Address section, you’ll select Puerto Rico as the country and fill out the remaining information. * Note that the shipping address section does not have Puerto Rico as a country. That is why you need to "Ship to a Different Address". 4.) In the Shipping Address section, you’ll select the United States as the country. Then choose PR (Puerto Rico) for the state and fill in the remaining information. For assistance creating a label, please call your local FedEx Representative.
